headline: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Completes Acquisition of  BTIG, LLC
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is one of the Best Blue Chip Stocks Under $100 to Buy Now. On June 1, the company announced that it had completed its acquisition of BTIG, LLC. BTIG will add significantly complementary capabilities to U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB)’s capital markets platform, strengthening its capability to cater to corporate and institutional clients. Together, […]

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
